entry.data:
MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS
SHOWERS, MAINLY THIS MORNING
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 70S
TEMPERATURE FALLING INTO THE MID 60S THIS AFTERNOON
SOUTHWEST WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 25 MPH, BECOMING WEST THIS AFTERNOON
CHANCE OF RAIN 90 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY CLOUDY
MUCH COOLER
LESS HUMID WITH LOWS AROUND 40
NORTHWEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 60S
SOUTHWEST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

CLEAR
LOWS IN THE UPPER 40S
SOUTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 70S
SOUTH WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH

MOSTLY CLEAR IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING MOSTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S

MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE MORNING, THEN SHOWERS LIKELY IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 70S
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS
SHOWERS
LOWS AROUND 60
CHANCE OF RAIN 90 PERCENT

SHOWERS
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 60S
CHANCE OF RAIN 90 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN CLEARING
MUCH COOLER WITH LOWS IN THE MID 30S

MOSTLY CLOUDY
LOWS AROUND 40
HIGHS IN THE MID 60S
